name: Gourmet's Chicken Divan
recipeIngredient: 1 large broccoli head, cut into 4-inch spears
1/4 cup unsalted butter, cut into pieces
2 boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cooked and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan of boiling salted water, cook the broccoli for 6-8 minutes or until it is just tender. Drain well and keep warm.
2. In a heavy saucepan, melt the butter over medium-low heat. Add flour and cook roux, stirring constantly, for 3 minutes.
3. Add the broth, stirring, and bring the mixture to a simmer, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to low and cook the mixture, stirring constantly, for an additional 10 minutes.
5. In a bowl, beat the cream until it holds stiff peaks. Fold the cream, Sherry, and lemon juice into the sauce. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Arrange broccoli on a flameproof baking dish or a 2-quart gratin dish and pour half the sauce over the broccoli.
7. Stir 1/4 cup Parmesan into the remaining sauce. Arrange the chicken on top of the broccoli, pour the remaining sauce over it, and sprinkle with the remaining Parmesan cheese.
8. Broil under a preheated broiler about 6 inches from the flame for 1 minute or until the sauce is golden and bubbling.
